song.title: My Prayer
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) More holiness give me, More strivings within, More patience in suff’ring, More sorrow for sin,|| More faith in my Savior, More sense of His care, More joy in His service, More freedom in prayer.
[C] Chorus: Come, my Savior, and help me, Comfort, strengthen and keep me; Thou each moment will save me, Thou art saving me now.
[V2] 2) More gratitude give me, More trust in the Lord, More zeal for His glory, More hope in His Word,|| More tears for His sorrows, More pain at His grief, More meekness in trial, More praise for relief.
[V3] 3) More purity give me, More strength to o’ercome, More freedom from earth-stains, More quest for the throne,|| More fit for the kingdom, More useful I’d be, More blessed and holy, More, Savior, like Thee.
song.author: Philip P. Bliss, Horatio R. Palmer
